Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-4's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to vacate dismissal per CCP 664.6 and to enter judgment is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
